title: (Solesteam's) Lucky Blocks
description: Couldn't find a proper lucky block Mod for modern Minecraft, the only ones I could find are Datapacks, which are cool, but if you don't have the right resource pack(s) loaded those tend to fall apart visually... So I made my own!
body:
Do YOU miss the good ol' days? Where a mod closely but not quite infringing on a certain platformer game's legal rights was all over the internet? Do you miss the Lucky Block mod of old?

Well, I don't have the technical know-how nor the actual permission to port the original to Modern Minecraft, so instead I made my own from scratch, combining a mix of some old events, some new, and some reimagined with a unique twist!
But be careful not to open them near your lovely well built home, they can get a tad...
Explosive...

Well, what are you waiting for? A kiss on the cheek!?
Download this mod, craft one of these gold-plated beauties, place it, break it, and have fun, but most importantly,
_Good Luck!_
You'll need it...
